title: Expose HTTP endpoint GET /records for downstream consumers
completion_summary: GET /records served from internal/httpapi. Query params: since (unix epoch float), pattern (string), limit (int, capped at 1000). Empty store and no-match queries return [] (never null). Bad `since` returns HTTP 400 with JSON error body. handler queries store.Query and JSON-encodes the result. Live VM acceptance: curl http://10.0.2.2:8080/healthz returned {"status":"ok"}; curl /records returned all 3 paired records as a JSON array with all schema fields populated; curl /records?limit=1 returned 1 record; curl /records?since=9999999999 returned []. 4 new HTTP unit tests pass: empty store returns [], pattern filter, limit clamp, invalid since → 400. Deliverables: observer/internal/httpapi/{server.go,server_test.go}, wiring through cmd/serve.go's httpapi.Config.Store.
